title: ucsd-cmi/compass pipeline - params.ref_database schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.ref_database

tool.errorMessage: Invalid tool name. Please see documentation for all supported tools. Currently these tools are included: bowtie2, bracken, kraken2.

ref_db_name.errorMessage: The unique name of the database should be provided.

ref_db_params.errorMessage: Invalid database ref_db_params entry. No quotes allowed.

ref_db_path.errorMessage: ref_db_path should be either a file path or a directory.
